session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/tui --tb=line 2>&1 | grep "FAILED" | head -40` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk to get the list of all failing test names. Also run `uv run pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/tui --tb=line 2>&1 | tail -30` to get the summary. Report all failing tests.
session.assistant: I'll run both commands to get the failing tests and summary.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/tui --tb=line 2>&1 | grep "FAILED" | head -40
Get failing test names from pytest

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Get pytest summary from last 30 lines

session.assistant:
## Summary
pytest failed: 21 issues found
### All Failing Tests
1. **tests/cli/commands/split/test_plan.py::test_execute_split_plan_creates_worktrees** — AttributeError: 'FakeGit' object has no attribute 'worktree'
2. **tests/cli/commands/split/test_plan.py::test_execute_split_plan_with_noop_ops** — AttributeError: 'MockDryRunGit' object has no attribute 'worktree'
3. **tests/commands/admin/test_plan_implement_workflow.py::test_creates_issue_when_not_provided** — Expected string "Created test plan #1" not found in output
4. **tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py::test_checkout_for_plan_creates_impl_folder** — Expected "Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from plan #500" but got "...from PR #500"
5. **tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py::test_checkout_for_plan_prints_activation_when_sync_status_fails** — Expected "...from plan #600" but got "...from PR #600"
6. **tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py::test_checkout_stacks_in_place_for_plan_outputs_activation_script** — Expected "...from plan #700" but got "...from PR #700"
7. **tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py::test_dispatch_happy_path** — Expected "Consolidate learn PRs" but got "Consolidate learn plans"
8. **tests/shared/github/test_metadata_schemas.py::TestWorktreeCreationSchema::test_invalid_issue_number_type** — Regex pattern mismatch
9. **tests/shared/github/test_metadata_schemas.py::TestWorktreeCreationSchema::test_negative_issue_number** — Expected regex "issue_number must be positive" but got "pr_number must be positive"
10. **tests/shared/github/test_metadata_schemas.py::TestPlanSchema::test_invalid_issue_number_type** — Expected regex "issue_number must be an integer" but got "pr_number must be an integer"
11. **tests/shared/github/test_metadata_schemas.py::TestPlanSchema::test_zero_issue_number** — Expected regex "issue_number must be positive" but got "pr_number must be positive"
12. **tests/unit/cli/commands/branch/test_create_cmd.py::test_branch_create_for_plan_creates_branch_and_impl_folder** — Expected "...from plan #123" but got "...from PR #123"
13. **tests/unit/cli/commands/branch/test_create_cmd.py::test_branch_create_for_plan_with_issue_url** — Expected "...from plan #456" but got "...from PR #456"
14. **tests/unit/cli/commands/branch/test_create_cmd.py::test_branch_create_for_plan_stacks_in_place_creates_impl** — Expected "...from plan #300" but got "...from PR #300"
15. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py::TestDetermineExitAction::test_plan_saved_marker_without_plan_number_fallback** — Expected "Plan PR saved" but got "PR saved"
16. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py::TestBuildStep2Message::test_contains_dispatch_command** — Expected "Dispatch plan #42:" but got "Dispatch PR #42:"
17. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_handle_no_changes.py::test_build_pr_body_includes_all_sections** — Expected "Duplicate plan" but got "Duplicate PR"
18. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_fetch_context.py::TestObjectiveFetchContext::test_bad_branch_pattern** — Expected "No plan found for branch" but got "No PR found for branch"
19. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_fetch_context.py::TestObjectiveFetchContext::test_plan_not_found** — Expected "No plan found for branch" but got "No PR found for branch"
20. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_fetch_context.py::TestPlannedPRBackend::test_planned_pr_plan_not_found** — Expected "No plan found for branch" but got "No PR found for branch"
21. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_save_to_issue.py::test_objective_save_to_issue_no_plan** — Expected "No plan found" but got "No PR found in ~/.claude/plans/"
22. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py::test_planned_pr_success_display** — Expected "Plan saved as planned PR" but got "PR saved as planned PR"
23. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_setup_impl_from_pr.py::test_planned_pr_plan_already_on_plan_branch** — Expected "Already on plan branch" but got "Already on PR branch"
24. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_setup_impl_from_pr.py::test_planned_pr_plan_skips_checkout_when_impl_exists** — Expected "...for plan #999..." but got "...for PR #999..."
25. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_track_learn_evaluation.py::test_track_learn_evaluation_infers_from_branch** — Expected "No plan specified" but got "No PR specified"
26. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_track_learn_evaluation.py::test_track_learn_evaluation_fails_without_issue** — Expected "No plan specified" but got "No PR specified"
27. **tests/unit/cli/commands/test_admin_test_workflow.py::test_happy_path_with_existing_issue** — Expected "Using existing plan #42" but got "Using existing PR #42"
28. **tests/unit/cli/commands/test_admin_test_workflow.py::test_happy_path_creating_new_issue** — Expected "Created test plan #1" but got "Created test PR #1"
29. **tests/unit/shared/test_next_steps.py::TestFormatPlanNextStepsPlain::test_hierarchical_format** — Expected "Implement plan #42:" but got "Implement PR #42:"
30. **tests/unit/shared/test_next_steps.py::TestFormatPlanNextStepsPlain::test_contains_dispatch** — Expected "Dispatch plan #42:" but got "Dispatch PR #42:"
**Test Results:** 21 failed, 6744 passed, 2 warnings in 43.95s
The primary pattern across these failures indicates that the codebase has been updated to use PR terminology instead of plan terminology in help strings and user-facing messages (hence the branch name `plnd/O9109-update-help-strings-03-10-0937`), but the tests have not been updated to match these changes. Additionally, there are 2 test failures related to missing `worktree` attributes in fake Git objects and one metadata schema test failure related to attribute naming (`pr_number` vs `issue_number`).
